column1: # English compound word splits for TGSpeechBox text parser.
# Splits derived from CMU Pronouncing Dictionary entries cross-referenced
# with parsed linguistic data. Curated and supplemented by the TGSpeechBox
# community. Add missing compounds as needed.
# Used by the text parser to phonemize compound halves independently,
# preserving vowel quality that eSpeak's compound reduction destroys.
